mapper.select: select id,category_id,seller_id,name,description,price,stock,status,cover_img,create_time,update_time from product where name like concat('%',#{productName},'%')
select id,parent_id,name,level,sort,description,enabled,create_time,update_time from category where enabled = 1 order by level ,sort , id
select c.id,parent_id,c.name,level,sort,c.description,enabled,c.create_time,c.update_time from category c left join product p on c.id = p.category_id where p.id = #{productId}
